title:
The Environmental Protection (Plastic Straws, Cotton 
Buds and Stirrers) (England) Regulations 2020: PIR - RPC Opinion (green-rated)
body: "The PIR is a review of The Environmental Protection (Plastic Straws, Cotton Buds and Stirrers) (England) Regulations 2020, which restrict the supply of single-use plastic items to reduce environmental harm.  The evidence presented provides a reasonable  assessment of the effectiveness and continuing  relevance of the Regulations. The analysis draws on  survey data and evaluation of environmental impacts  since implementation. The PIR demonstrates the  objectives of protecting the environment, reducing harm  to marine life, and encouraging alternatives remain valid,  and the Regulations have been successful in achieving  these aims. The exemption mechanisms have functioned  effectively to protect access for those with specific  needs.  The Department’s recommendation to retain the  Regulations is supported by the evidence presented,  although quantification of plastic items placed on the market would significantly strengthen the review.  The PIR is green-rated; fit for purpose. "
